summary: Full backend + frontend testing of new AI Lab feature (deck review, template generator, admin leads + CSV). 11/11 backend pytest cases pass. All frontend flows verified end-to-end via Playwright: Header nav AI Lab + NEW badge (desktop & mobile), /ai-lab landing with 3 tool cards, /ai-lab/deck-review form validation (submit disabled w/o PDF), /ai-lab/template-generator full happy path (logo upload → palette auto-extract → .pptx download = 35 KB), admin login + AI Lab Leads tab rendering with stats / filter chips / search / table / CSV export download.

issues: FAQ link is absent from the mobile slide-out menu (Services, Case Studies, Pricing, AI Lab, Resources, Blog, My Dashboard are present). The review_request listed FAQ as part of regression coverage on mobile — please confirm if FAQ should be there or if it is intentionally omitted on mobile.

action_items: (Optional) Decide whether FAQ should appear in the mobile nav menu. Desktop nav has not been re-checked for FAQ in this iteration.
critical_code_review_comments: ai_lab.py _record_lead source_ip fallback uses Python operator precedence trap: `request.headers.get('x-forwarded-for', '').split(',')[0].strip() or request.client.host if request.client else ''` — the `if request.client else ''` only guards `request.client.host`, not the earlier expression. Works today because the left side is a string, but readability/intent would improve with explicit parentheses.

Daily rate-limit check uses `created_at >= cutoff` where created_at is stored as an ISO-8601 string. String compare works because ISO strings are lex-sortable WITH the same Z/offset, but is fragile — prefer storing/querying datetime objects in Mongo.

extract_palette: bad mime returns 400 even when the file is a text/plain payload — good. Large-file test only triggers 413 when raw bytes exceed 8 MB AFTER the read; FastAPI reads the whole upload into memory which is acceptable here given the cap, but a streaming size check via Content-Length header would be safer against DoS.
/api/admin/ai-lab/leads.csv has no row count headers and does not paginate (capped at 5000 leads in to_list). Fine for current scale but flag for future growth.
AILabLanding/AIDeckReview/AITemplateGenerator are well-structured; data-testid coverage is excellent. No critical issues found.
seed_data_creation: Created ~6 TEST_ leads in ai_lab_leads collection during template-generator + rate-limit tests (emails prefixed TEST_qa+ / TEST_rl+ and qa+ui+ for UI test). Not cleaned up — they're useful for future regression but main agent may wish to purge if cluttering the admin table.
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Lab is feature-complete and passing. New regression test file /app/backend/tests/test_ai_lab.py covers palette extraction (happy / bad-mime / oversize), template generation happy path, 3/day rate limit (429), deck-review PDF validation, and all 4 admin endpoints (auth required + list + filter + CSV). UI test confirms .pptx download is real (PK header, 35 KB). Deck-review real LLM call was NOT exercised end-to-end (no sample PDF + would consume API quota); only form validation + 400-on-non-PDF were tested. Main agent already verified happy path via curl earlier.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found in this iteration.
